brief: Generate a course-overview page layout (CourseOverviewPage.tsx, default export) for the UpSkill showcase app, using ONLY components imported from '@upskill/components'. Structure: a single page containing (1) a hero area with the course Heading, a short description, and a VideoFrame; (2) a 'Course modules' area listing four AccordionItems built from a data array — the first module open by default, and the page must track how many modules are currently open using React state updated from each item's open-state changes; each module's body ends with a duration line showing a small clock Icon before the duration text, both rendered in the secondary text color; (3) a 'You may also like' area with a grid of three CardVerticals built from a data array. Use proper HTML landmarks throughout. Spacing must come from the layout components' token-based props — do not hand-write CSS, inline spacing styles, or media queries.

requiredPatterns.reason: canonical disclosure change-callback name — required to track open modules
